Finding: Multiprocessing synchronization objects created from different context
v5.6 Resolution: Event/Array/Value/Queue/Process objects are created from one spawn context in competitive coordinator.

Finding: Parallel exact-resume path passed but not used coherently
v5.6 Resolution: Each branch has one authoritative resume path recorded in the branch manifest; exact resume restores that branch path directly.

Finding: Parent cancellation did not signal children
v5.6 Resolution: Safe Stop sets shared cancel_event; child branches stop and coordinator commits common safe state.

Finding: Coordinator stopped when any child exited
v5.6 Resolution: Coordinator supervises until all children exit or an explicit fatal failure occurs.

Finding: Child exit codes/errors not validated
v5.6 Resolution: Fatal messages and nonzero exit codes fail the competitive training job before base selection.

Finding: Merge metadata overstated contributors
v5.6 Resolution: No merge exists; session metadata records requested/started/successful/failed branch counts and success requires all branches.

Finding: Independent PPO networks naively weight-averaged
v5.6 Resolution: Arithmetic network averaging removed. Independent branches compete; scientifically superior champion is selected.

Finding: Merged policy had no coherent optimizer/RNG/curriculum exact state
v5.6 Resolution: No merged trainer state exists. Every branch preserves its own exact optimizer/RNG/curriculum resume checkpoint.

Finding: Parallel training returned empty history
v5.6 Resolution: Coordinator returns branch/status/champion/base-selection history.

Finding: Parallel path dropped heterogeneous-training semantics
v5.6 Resolution: Competitive workers rebuild full HeterogeneousTrainingConfig and invoke heterogeneous trainer when configured.

Finding: Legacy curriculum conversion off by one
v5.6 Resolution: Conversion uses explicit resume format/curriculum encoding metadata; v4.1 one-based stages convert deterministically.

Finding: Training mutated process-global RNG state
v5.6 Resolution: Standalone standard/heterogeneous wrappers restore caller Python/NumPy/Torch/CUDA RNG; competitive branches execute in isolated processes.

Finding: Worker distribution lacked validation/XPU sidecar awareness
v5.6 Resolution: Worker counts are validated and XPU sidecar availability participates in scheduling recommendations; unsupported multi-branch sidecar training is blocked.

Finding: Broad exception suppression could hide scientific checkpoint/progress failures
v5.6 Resolution: Competitive checkpoint/branch failures propagate and fail closed. Benign cleanup/device-fallback exception handling remains and is not claimed eliminated globally.

Finding: Deployable snapshots mutable
v5.6 Resolution: Base/deployable artifacts are immutable unique files; mutable logical alias is separate.

Finding: Immutable terminal metadata pointed to mutable alias
v5.6 Resolution: Immutable artifact paths point to unique artifact files; logical Base alias is separately identified.

Finding: Deployable snapshot immediately overwritten
v5.6 Resolution: Alias is atomically copied from immutable artifact; immutable artifact is not rewritten.

Finding: Safe Stop overwrote full payload with reduced payload
v5.6 Resolution: Safe Stop commits complete exact branch resume state through one trusted resume format; no reduced second overwrite.

Finding: GUI expected obsolete epoch_* lineage files
v5.6 Resolution: v5.6 registers the logical competitive Base/immutable artifact; epoch_* scanning remains compatibility-only for older outputs.

Finding: Continuation could overwrite experiment-referenced policy
v5.6 Resolution: Old experiment-bound artifacts remain immutable by SHA; logical Base may point to a newer artifact without changing older bindings.

Finding: Weights-only fine-tune conflated cumulative epoch with exact continuation
v5.6 Resolution: Base-Guided Fork is explicitly fresh optimizer/RNG training; Exact Resume restores full branch state. Fork source exposure and branch phase are distinct provenance.

Finding: Dispute register stale
v5.6 Resolution: v5 dispute register updated to describe competitive branch/no-averaging/immutable state behavior.

Finding: Qualification interval advisory only
v5.6 Resolution: Formal Policy Qualification remains explicitly separate; UI/release documentation does not claim automatic scientific qualification at every interval.
